query:
-- Update Deal 1: Acme Corp - Technical Evaluation, complex enterprise deal
UPDATE deals SET 
  name = 'Acme Corp — Enterprise Sales Intelligence',
  company = 'Acme Corp',
  website = 'https://acmecorp.com',
  stage = 'Technical Evaluation',
  value = 240000,
  confidenceScore = 68,
  daysInStage = 18,
  lastActivity = 'Technical deep-dive with engineering team',
  riskOneLiner = 'IT security review stalled — no response from CISO for 2 weeks',
  companyInfo = 'Acme Corp is a Fortune 500 enterprise software company with 8,000 employees. Their sales org has 120 AEs managing complex enterprise deals averaging $500K ACV and 9-month cycles. Pain: AEs lose deals because they cannot track multi-stakeholder dynamics across 6-12 month cycles. Current stack: Salesforce + Gong, but no deal intelligence layer.',
  salesModel = 'meddic'
WHERE id = 1 AND tenantId = 1;

-- Update Deal 2: GlobalTech - Negotiation
UPDATE deals SET 
  name = 'GlobalTech — Revenue Intelligence Platform',
  company = 'GlobalTech',
  website = 'https://globaltech.io',
  stage = 'Negotiation',
  value = 180000,
  confidenceScore = 82,
  daysInStage = 7,
  lastActivity = 'Legal review of MSA terms',
  riskOneLiner = 'Procurement pushing for 20% discount — champion has limited budget authority',
  companyInfo = 'GlobalTech is a B2B SaaS company (Series C, 600 employees) selling AI-powered analytics to financial services. Their VP Sales wants to standardize deal methodology across 45 AEs. Currently using HubSpot but lacking deal intelligence. Strong champion in VP Sales (Marcus Chen) who has internal approval to close.',
  salesModel = 'spiced'
WHERE id = 2 AND tenantId = 1;

-- Update Deal 4: Nexus Systems - Demo stage
UPDATE deals SET 
  name = 'Nexus Systems — Sales Ops Transformation',
  company = 'Nexus Systems',
  website = 'https://nexussystems.com',
  stage = 'Demo',
  value = 320000,
  confidenceScore = 42,
  daysInStage = 12,
  lastActivity = 'Product demo with RevOps team',
  riskOneLiner = 'No executive sponsor identified — RevOps team enthusiastic but lacks budget authority',
  companyInfo = 'Nexus Systems is a manufacturing conglomerate (NYSE: NXS, 15,000 employees) undergoing digital transformation. Their CRO wants to modernize the 200-person sales org. Complex buying committee: CRO, VP Sales, RevOps Director, IT Security, Procurement. Deal size could expand to $500K+ with full deployment.',
  salesModel = 'meddic'
WHERE id = 4 AND tenantId = 1;

-- Update Deal 60001: Nike - Discovery
UPDATE deals SET 
  name = 'Nike — Global Sales Intelligence',
  company = 'Nike, Inc.',
  website = 'https://nike.com',
  stage = 'Discovery',
  value = 480000,
  confidenceScore = 35,
  daysInStage = 5,
  lastActivity = 'Initial discovery call with VP Sales Operations',
  riskOneLiner = 'Early stage — no clear champion, multiple competing priorities in Q1',
  companyInfo = 'Nike is a global consumer goods company (NYSE: NKE, 79,000 employees) with a large B2B wholesale sales division. Their enterprise sales team manages complex retailer relationships. VP Sales Ops (Sarah Kim) reached out after seeing Meridian at SaaStr. Potential for 50-seat deployment across their strategic accounts team.',
  salesModel = 'bant'
WHERE id = 60001 AND tenantId = 1;
